events.text: Configure ClickUp — Set CLICKUP_API_TOKEN in .env, restart server.py.
Configure Slack — Slack needs a Bot token (xoxb-). Current .env has an app-level token (xapp-). Replace SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.
Configure Email — Set GMAIL_ACCESS_TOKEN (or SMTP creds) in .env. See docs/connectors.md for the OAuth flow.
Configure WhatsApp — Set TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID + TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN + TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM in .env.
Configure SMS — Set TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID + TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN + TWILIO_SMS_FROM in .env.
Configure Calendar — Set GOOGLE_CALENDAR_ACCESS_TOKEN (or OAuth refresh token) in .env.

events.summary: Indexed rawdata staff/employee list CSV into knowledge/staff_labor_roster.json — 7 captains, 55 labor pool entries, 3 overflow decor partners, 5 data issues flagged.
Indexed October 2025 sales scorecard CSV — 4 people records created (Andre core partnership / Toni+Eduarda+Ren peer tier), full scoring framework + current scores + team averages captured.

Indexed Brazilian Churches in MA CSV — 32 deduped churches across 8 denominations, 4 pastor-networks identified (Pallú/Souza/Mendes/Coelho). Created projects/brazilian_church_outreach.json owned by Andre with live_band, next_move, blockers.

Indexed Venue Partners CSV — 85 venues across 3 tiers + corporate accounts + red flags + single-event catalog. Top-frequency: Monoosnock (13/Toni), Harding Allen (11+/Eduarda), Versailles (6/Toni). Owner breakdowns captured for Andre/Eduarda/Toni.

Indexed wedding sales deck — 9 messaging pillars, 11 slides, signature voice anchors for Rodbot, 3 copy inconsistencies flagged (7d/24h, 1yr/2yr, $2350 math), 4 claims requiring verification, 4 operational hooks into other bedrock files.

source.headline: Generate today's moves
source.preview: Reads projects · people · threads · commitments · ledgers.
source.detail:
Click 'Generate from Mission Control' in the action bar above. The AI reads your bedrock and proposes six candidate first-moves, weighted against your declared North Stars.

If no anchors are declared yet, the proposals are unweighted — so worth declaring at least one anchor in ledgers/north_star.json before you care about the ordering.

events.detail: Generate today's moves → queued for review

events.summary: Indexed Rodrigo's working 'Welcome To Comeketo' deck (69 slides) — 4-Secrets framework, price-lock operational terms, integrity promise, 9-question evaluation checklist, 7-question yes-ladder, 3 objection rebuttals, bonus stack, 3 named partners (DJ Smokey / Above & Beyond Creatives / Ebenezer Decorations). Flagged Comeketo-owned venue reveal (slide 48) as missing from bedrock. Founder-voice corpus pillar #2 of 3.

Indexed tasting conversion tracking — 2026 YTD 124 attended / 49 won / 29 pending / 39.5% booking rate; Oct 26 tasting attendee detail (6 people, 2 quality-complaint losses flagged for kitchen/service conversation). Per-owner signal captured for Andre/Ren/Eduarda. Ceiling hypothesis: ~40% is current structural ceiling.

Indexed Event Labor Projection Weekly Summary — 38 events Week 12-31 (mid-March → late July 2026), peak Week 25 (7 events). Flagged as calendar-only, not a real labor projection (staff assignments missing). 8 named couples/leads extracted for future cross-reference.

Indexed Kitchen Schedule (week 2026-02-16) + Bibi's Weekly Prep List. Kitchen snapshot: -$4,737 bandwidth, capacity 3-4 events/week, 4 urgent-need staff flags. Menu catalog: 32 Brazilian dishes across 6 categories, 4 signature items (Pão de Queijo, Coxinha, Passion Fruit Mousse, Tropeiro Beans). Churrasco/grill menu flagged as missing from raw data.

Indexed Dec 2025 lead-source attribution — 18-channel universe (Wedding Wire, The Knot, FB/IG, website, Google, Bark, Fash, Eventective, Zola, weddingplanner, Social Organic, Inbound, Referral, Venue Referral, Lead from Rodrigo, Old/Repeat, EZ Cater). 12 named closes attributed. Organic digital 66.7% dominant. Header claims 18 deals but body shows 12 — flagged gap. Brazilian church channel flagged as missing.

Indexed Dom's cash-flow/revenue-projection sheet — 3 sections (Won Deals pre-7/11, After 7/11, Anne's Forecasts), ~160 client rows × ~100 weekly buckets, horizon 2025-07-06 → 2027-06-05. Grand total $693,837 tracked revenue. 80% accuracy caveat respected. Cross-referenced 9 clients against Dec 2025 leads tracker and Oct 26 tasting. Flagged new-people candidates (Dom, Anne, Cath, Camila) as management layer not yet indexed.

Consolidated GoDaddy product portfolio (7 domains + 8 M365 seats + 2 WP hosts, ~$2,476/yr) and Google Sheet registry (~20 sheets, owner-email/users/purpose) into a single infrastructure inventory. Surfaced 4 sibling Rodrigo brands (Comeketo, VirtualKitchenhall, MoneyOnYourWay, RioFitMeals), 7 management-layer people candidates, and 2 P0 raw-data requests (LATEST Pricing Guide & FAQ, Comeketo AI AGENT adjustment feedback sheet).

Indexed Massachusetts food-truck event index — 34 events across 10 counties, horizon 2025-2027. FTFA (9 events) is dominant organizer cluster; Foodees LLC (2), Wachusett Mountain (2), community-civic (12) fill the rest. 17 confirmed-scheduled in 2026. Strategic ambiguity flagged: unclear whether Comeketo is actually entering the food-truck channel or merely scouting — no trace of food-truck ops in menu, staff, or sales data. 9/34 events have uncertain/historical status — data quality caveat.

Where should I look? "New information" could mean a lot of things here — a few candidates:

- **Close CRM** — new leads/activities/opportunities since a cutoff
- **Bedrock** — recently modified files in `CCAgentindex/` (I can see activity as recent as 16:50 today)
- **Slack / ClickUp / Gmail** — unread or recent messages
- **Inbox / ledger** — fresh entries in `_inbox/inbox.jsonl` or `_ledger/`

W

Indexed the 3,557-line Partnership Program corpus. 8-section structure, 4-tier model (Connected/Preferred/Growth/Advocacy), 3-msg IG outreach sequence, 4 tier-specific DM scripts, 6 verbatim Rodbot voice samples, ClickUp operational infrastructure. Critical finding: RESOLVED the apparent 'no kickbacks' vs 'Partnership Program' tension — zero money flows between Comeketo and partners in either direction; document explicitly states 'No commissions. No kickbacks. No pay-to-play.' Document is framework-only; zero specific partners are named here (roster lives in Welcome-Rodrigo deck). Flagged 4 gaps: partner roster audit, program live-state verification, 6-mo roadmap promotion, IG tracker sheet identification.

Indexed the 2,254-line Sales Playbook V2.0 — the cornerstone Rodbot feedstock. Extracted 14-section outline; 7 signature rhetorical moves (Would-It-Be-a-Terrible-Idea, I-Hear-You reframe, Social-Proof+Scarcity, Mirror+Sounds-Like, Paint-Cost-of-Inaction, Imagine-Visualization, Curious-Not-Transactional); opener library; 19 discovery questions; complete 9-objection library; 7 closing moves; pricing anchors; 13 signature phrases; full 5-day cadence + post-tasting + quote escalation; 9 red-line avoid-this/do-that comparisons; emotional core. Flagged 5 Rodbot-specific gaps (handoff triggers, safety rules, AI disclosure, regression tests, Rodbot/*.md distillation). Marked as canonical Rodbot reference. All 18 rawdata files now indexed.

Here's what's live in bedrock (modified within the last ~2 hours):

**People (5)** — `andre_raw`, `eduarda`, `ren`, `toni` (plus older `rodrigo`)

**Projects** — `brazilian_church_outreach.json` is the freshly-touched one

**Knowledge (15 cards)** — heavy Comeketo ops layer just landed:
- Brand: `brand_wedding_experience`, `brand_welcome_rodrigo`
- Sales: `sales_playbook_v2`, `sales_team_scorecard

Distilled the Rodbot identity layer from Sales Playbook V2.0, Welcome-Rodrigo deck, and Partnership Program corpus. Replaced all four placeholder files with full content. identity.md: 3-audience architecture (team/couples/partners), 6-point posture, boundary set, emotional north star (anxiety→peace of mind), governing principle (Trust). character.md: register map (B2C/B2B/internal), 8-rule weighted voice table, 7 B2C signature moves + 4 B2B signature moves, 9 signature phrases with usage rules, 11 red lines, 8-item handoff-to-humans trigger list, 5 reference example drafts. traits.md: enthusiasm curve (energized vs neutral vs actively cool), decision style (gestures>declarations, recent>historical), team posture table (8 people), B2C/B2B/post-tasting customer posture, typed-abstention discipline. affective_essence.md: 8-register tonal palette (direct-observational default, quietly admiring, operationally warm, patient-concerned, trust-anchored, dry/understated, tactical-empathy echo, matter-of-fact closure) with register-selection rule of thumb table and balance rules (75% default, ~25% colored, ~1-in-15 trust-anchored).

Stood up people/* records for three management-layer people identified in the infrastructure inventory. Camila (partnerships/venue relationships/cross-functional ops — broadest access footprint of any non-Rodrigo person, named 'week value' KPI owner in Feb 16 2026 kitchen schedule). Anne (event-planning lead, post-tasting client care, authors ~100-row forecast section of the master cash-flow sheet, treated as full-time Captain alongside Carlos and Bibi in payroll-average sheet). Domenic (cash-flow / revenue-projection sheet custodian, 164 rows x 100 weeks, $693,837 tracked revenue, self-noted 80% accuracy discipline). All three files created with anchors back to source knowledge artifacts and explicit null/notes on the missing contact fields. Registered in indexes/index.json alphabetically within people[].

Created projects/comeketo_owned_venue.json to track the Comeketo-owned-venue ambiguity flagged by slide 48 of the Welcome-Rodrigo deck ('THIS VERY VENUE — Officially Opens this Spring! 50-100 People — Hall+Catering+DJ'). Status set to 'ambiguous — surfaced by sales deck, unverified operationally.' Hypothesizes the VirtualKitchenhall sibling brand as the probable operational identity based on name parse (Kitchen+Hall) and the fact that office@virtualkitchenhall.com owns multiple Comeketo ops sheets. Named blockers (address unknown, venue name ambiguous, no operational evidence in bedrock yet), next-move questions for Rodrigo (is it live? is it VirtualKitchenhall?), hypothesis explicit, and a Rodbot red line written in: do NOT surface the owned-venue claim in outbound drafts until resolved — the sales deck uses it as a tasting-day reveal and Rodbot outbound comes before tasting.

events.title: Unblock MA church hubs, venue proof, lead sweep, and partner CSV parsing

events.detail: Unblock MA church hubs, venue proof, lead sweep, and partner CSV parsing

events.content:
What's up, Rodbot? 

What should we get into?

We’ve got three clean lanes.

1. **Close the loop on live leads**  
   Check for anything sitting too long, especially past the 5-day cadence. That’s the money leak.

2. **Tighten the partnership cadence**  
   Camila’s lane: no-ask admiration notes to any partner untouched in 30+ days. Quiet compounding. No theater.

3. **Push the app work that’s been circling**  
   Inbox / commitments / detail pages. The UI stuff you were in earlier. Boring until it isn’t.

If you want my read: **start with live leads**. Revenue first. Then partnership maintenance. Then the app polish before it turns into abstract architecture cosplay.

Pick one and I’ll help you cut it into the next move.

events.summary: Indexed a 33-section founder self-description of the business — compressed from a prior recorded conversation with Rodrigo and supplied by Jake. Marked high canonical weight: this is how the founder sees his own operation, which carries different weight than any sheet or deck. Preserved full 33-point scaffold verbatim, then added three interpretive layers: 10 bedrock confirmations (venues as #1 referral source, Close CRM primacy, weekly cadence, spreadsheet-nativity, etc.), 10 net-new facts (tastings happen TWICE A WEEK at a hall, team is 4-5 people normally scaling up, explicit team composition with unresolved 'remote sales manager' + 'two admin' + 'marketing component' roles, lead tracker is also a cash-flow forecaster, preferred vendors are location-aware, reimbursement + commission reports exist as artifacts, social media as explicit growth priority across 5 channels), and 10 gaps (unnamed roles, P1 raw-data requests, calendar connector, event complexity codification, tasting-hall <-> owned-venue cross-reference). Added rodbot_implications section pointing at posture shifts, character sharpening, and new red lines — centering the founder's 'manually overextended' diagnosis as the operational thesis Rodbot builds from.

Indexed a 4-segment audio transcript of the tasting experience — two marketing narrator segments and two Rodrigo direct recordings including a full 360 tour. Distinct from knowledge/tasting_conversion_tracking.json because that file is performance data; this file is the canonical description of what a tasting IS. Preserved Rodrigo's specimen quote verbatim in segment_4. Extracted: 8-step canonical sequence of service (arrival -> checklist -> cheese board -> appetizers -> salad bar -> hot sides + rodizio + presentation -> desserts -> 'take a day or two'); specific dishes named (coxinha, pao de queijo, empanadas, chickpea salad, flan, passion fruit mousse, grilled pineapple with cinnamon sugar); the multi-vendor 'big tasting' pattern where photographers + wedding planners + decorators + DJs are physically co-located at the facility (this is the Partnership Program operating in the room). Triangulated three prior bedrock threads: the 'our facility' where tastings happen is very likely the twice-a-week hall (business topology point 20) AND the slide-48 owned venue (projects/comeketo_owned_venue.json) — three data points now converge on a single physical space. Captured 7 Rodrigo voice specimens with rodbot-application notes for character.md additions. Logged 5 company-name transcription errors (Kamiketa/Kamiketo/Comic Keto/Comicado/Kamikido -> Comeketo) plus the 'pao de quiche' -> 'pao de queijo' correction — both flagged as DO-NOT-PROPAGATE.

events.content: Can you just write something simple with markdown rendering so I can see what it looks like in the chat?
Can you just write something simple with markdown rendering so I can see what it looks like in the chat?

Sure — here's a little something to render:

## Wednesday, 4:15pm

You've got a **grid in front of you**, a *Rodbot* wired up, and about `17` browser tabs confessing to things I won't name.

### What's on deck
- Rodrigo's morning text — *still the anchor*
- Andre's afternoon touch — **not optional**
- ClickUp + Slack — touched, or it didn't happen

> Trust. It's what matters in this business.

Here's a fake link: [don't click this](https://example.com)

Here's a tiny code block:

```js
const rodbot = { mood: "composed", ask: "one" };
```

And a divider —

---

If the bold / italics / headers / list / blockquote / code / link / hr all render cleanly, markdown is wired. If any of it shows up as raw `**asterisks**`, we've got a parser to fix.
